Chunk ZIP
======================================
`cytozip <https://github.com/DingWB/cytozip>`_ is a python package for biological data storage and analysis.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:

   quick_start
   dnam
   dev
   benchmark
   notebooks/python_api
   notebooks/remote_reading
   modules

Credits and Thanks
========================
The package was provided by Wubin Ding.
